_comment: Dedicated ADO daemon instance (DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=MCQdb) — layers on appsettings.json and overrides ONLY the ADO/repo/store settings so it runs in parallel with the default GitHub daemon. The pooled review path is the ONLY one that works against an ADOPTED gateway: it pre-creates slot dirs, so the pool root MUST live under the gateway's WORKSPACE_BASE_PATH. That path is environment-specific, so it is supplied at launch via SandboxGateway__WorkspaceBasePath (+ optionally CodeReviewDaemon__ReviewPoolHostRoot), NOT committed here. See ADO-ONBOARDING.md.

Ado._comment: azure-devops-mcp public client id (see LmStreaming.Sample/AuthProviderGuide.md). MSAL.NET interactive (browser + loopback + PKCE), no secret. Scope is the Azure DevOps resource .default. The daemon has no sign-in subcommand: sign in ONCE out-of-band (e.g. via LmStreaming.Sample) into the shared token store this instance reads via the Auth__TokenStoreDir launch env var.
